creator: bdrewery@FreeBSD.org
text:
For example, take a bug. Then save. Then add a comment and save. You'll collide with your own modification.

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Post/Redirect/Get

Bugzilla seems to be missing some Redirect->GET on some of its POSTS. I've noticed this when taking a ticket or modifying an attachment to be a patch.

My preferences are to go back to the same ticket, and not the "next in list". This may have something to do with it.

This seems to likely be an actual bugzilla bug and not ours, but I think it is worth fixing to avoid losing changes.
